title: Ravage Nation
overview: In 2036 CV5 was born. A stronger strain vaccine resistance. Mothers gave birth to hybrid creatures and mutations Others had zombie like qualities. A mere bite or scratch and within 12 seconds you were turned. This was the new normal. Beasts hunted man for food and sport. From horror visionary master writer/director Michael Moutsatsos brings you the next chapter in the RAVAGE series. RAVAGE NATION coming soon.
